---
title: "Tests & Scales"
---

## Psychological Tests and Scales

This section lists psychometric instruments I have developed, adapted, or validated. Over time, each instrument will have a dedicated page with full psychometric documentation including factor structure, reliability estimates, measurement invariance results, and normative data where available.

---

<!-- Add your instruments here. Example format:

### Brief Multidimensional Students' Life Satisfaction Scale (BMSLSS) — Chilean Adaptation
**Original authors**: Seligson, Huebner, & Valois (2003)  
**Adaptation**: Gempp & colleagues  
**Population**: Chilean adolescents  
**Method**: IRT (Graded Response Model)  
**Status**: Published

Psychometric evaluation of the BMSLSS using IRT with Chilean adolescent samples. Results support adequate item and scale properties.

[Publication](link-to-paper) · [Psychometric report](tests/bmslss/) · [Scoring guide (PDF)](files/tests/bmslss-scoring.pdf)

---

### HEXACO-60 — Chilean Validation
**Original authors**: Ashton & Lee (2009)  
**Adaptation**: Gempp & colleagues  
**Population**: Chilean adults  
**Method**: ESEM, Measurement Invariance  
**Status**: In preparation

Validation of the HEXACO-60 personality inventory for Chilean populations using Exploratory Structural Equation Modeling.

[Psychometric report](tests/hexaco-60/)

---

### Dark Triad Scale (Machiavellianism/Psychopathy subscales)
**Population**: Chilean adults  
**Method**: CFA, Rasch analysis  
**Status**: Under review

Investigation of the factor structure and item properties of dark personality measures.

-->

*This section is under construction. Instruments will be added with their corresponding psychometric documentation as it becomes available.*

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Psychometric Reports
Each instrument page (when available) will include: dimensionality evidence (EFA/CFA/ESEM), reliability estimates (omega, H coefficient), item-level statistics (IRT parameters where applicable), measurement invariance results, and normative data.
:::
